[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 11010001 4
2 10111001 5
3 00010011 3
4 11110111 7
5 01010011 4
6 10101010 4
7 00000011 2

01 10 11000001 3
12 21 11111010 6
23 32 10110111 6
34 43 10100100 3
45 54 11111001 6
56 65 10101001 4
67 76 01010000 2
70 07 00101000 2

02 20 00111011 5
13 31 01001101 4
24 42 00010011 3 match 3
35 53 01011101 5
46 64 01010000 2
57 75 11111001 6
60 06 01111000 4
71 17 11101001 5

03 30 10001100 3
14 41 11101001 5
25 52 11101010 5
36 63 11110100 5
47 74 00000000 a match 0
50 05 11010001 4 match 1
61 16 10111001 5 match 2
72 27 00010011 3 match 3

04 40 00101000 2
15 51 00010000 1
26 62 01000011 3
37 73 10100100 3
